prompt: I need a skill for deploying Next.js applications to AWS using CDK. It should cover the full workflow: building the app, synthesizing the CDK stack, deploying to staging first then production with a manual approval gate. The skill needs to handle environment-specific configs and include rollback procedures. Make sure there are scripts for common operations.
assertions: A SKILL.md file exists in the output skill directory
The SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with name and description fields
The description includes 'Use when' trigger conditions mentioning Next.js and deployment
The SKILL.md body contains a multi-step numbered deployment workflow with at least 5 steps
The SKILL.md body mentions staging and production environments with environment-specific configuration
The SKILL.md body includes rollback procedures with at least 3 specific strategies
A scripts/ directory exists with at least 2 deployment-related .ts scripts
The scripts use Bun TypeScript (.ts files) with --help flag support
Scripts output structured JSON to stdout
An evals/evals.json file exists with at least 2 test cases with assertions
The SKILL.md body includes a Common mistakes table with at least 5 entries
The SKILL.md body is under 500 lines
The skill includes a manual approval gate before production deployment
The skill includes a references/ directory with CDK stack patterns
The name field matches the directory name 'nextjs-cdk-deploy'
